Activité Robocare offre une solution pour prévenir la 
propagation rapide des maladies chez les plantes sous 
serres et l'utilisation massive des pesticides. Robocare 
détecte les maladies à une étape précoce en utilisant la 
technologie spectrale ce qui va améliorer la qualité des 
récoltes et diminuer l’utilisation des pesticides.
Aspect Technologique Nous prenons soin des cultures grâce 
à l'imagerie spectrale et à l'IA avancée.
Originalité TomaCare est un système de surveillance 
numérique pour l'agriculture de précision et la détection 
des maladies, basé sur des algorithmes d'IA et la 
technologie hyperspectrale. Il capte les signaux des 
plantes qui sont invisibles à l'œil humain, en utilisant les 
technologies hyper et multispectrales pour surveiller 
le stress des plantes et la diminution de leur activité 
photosynthétique.
Activity Robocare offers a solution to prevent the 
rapid spread of diseases in greenhouse plants and the 
massive use of pesticides. Robocare detects diseases 
at an early stage using spectral technology which will 
improve crop quality and reduce the use of pesticides. 
Technological 
Aspect 
precision 
farming 
and 
disease 
detection based on AI algorithms and hyperspectral 
technology. 
Originality TomaCare is a digital monitoring system for 
precision farming and disease detection based on AI 
algorithms and hyperspectral technology. It captures 
plant signals that are invisible to human eyes, using hyper 
and multispectral technologies to monitor plant-stress 
and decrease in their photosynthetic activity.

# We Tech-Care Of your Land
**Boost yields and detect plant stress early with smart agronomic insights powered by satellites, drones, and IoT.**
[Request demo](https://app.satellite.robocare.tn/signup)
##
## Do You Have A Land Project We Can Help With?
[Contact us](https://robocare.tn/?page_id=13)
## Why RoboCare is Different
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%27http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%27%20width%3D%271024%27%20height%3D%271024%27%20viewBox%3D%270%200%201024%201024%27%3E%3Crect%20width%3D%271024%27%20height%3D%271024%27%20fill-opacity%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E)
At RoboCare, our strength comes from the integration of agronomy, data science, and cutting-edge technology.
With years of hands-on field experience and R&D, we’ve positioned ourselves as a leading digital transformation partner in agriculture, tailored specifically for the MENA region.
Our Managed Services deliver an end-to-end suite of intelligent tools that:
* Maximize crop productivity
* Enhance sustainability through precision agriculture
* Mitigate risks and reduce operational costs
* Empower data-driven decision-making at every level
What truly sets RoboCare apart is our ability to translate complex agricultural data into actionable insights — built by agronomists, powered by data, and delivered through intuitive technology.
We’re not just building digital solutions; we’re transforming agriculture — one field at a time.
![](https://robocare.tn/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Design-sans-titre-5.png)

## **
RoboCare**
_RoboCare is A monitoring management platform for farms:
Providing agronomic recommendations for plant needs optimization and early stress detection, using Satellites, drones, OT and Farmer expertise._
